rules: Never edit a file with status=locked unless owner matches your agent id.
If lock is held by another agent, skip to another unblocked task.
Only lock files needed for the current step, not the full backlog.
Release locks immediately after each atomic change set.
If an agent crashes, stale locks older than 45 minutes can be reclaimed with notes.
